info.title: TechCup Futbol - Backend API
info.description: Plataforma digital para la gestión del torneo semestral de fútbol

tags.name: Teams
tags.description: Endpoints for team management and roster

tags.name: Players
tags.description: Endpoints for managing player profiles and availability

tags.name: Tournaments
tags.description: Endpoints for tournament creation and administration

put.description: Allowed roles: PLAYER, CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
Stores main position, secondary position, jersey number, dominant foot and availability linked to the user. Allowed roles: PLAYER, CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
Assigns or updates a user's role. Allowed roles: ADMINISTRATOR, ORGANIZER
Configures rules, courts, schedules and sanctions for the tournament. Allowed roles: ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
Updates the base configuration of the tournament. Allowed roles: ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR

get.description: Retrieves the details of a team by its ID

put.description: Updates team base information. Allowed roles: CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR

delete.description: Deletes a team. Allowed roles: ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR

put.description: Updates the player's sports profile information. Allowed roles: PLAYER, CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR

post.description: Allowed roles: ADMINISTRATOR, ORGANIZER
Stores external user subtype and relation description. Allowed roles: PLAYER, CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
Receives full body image (multipart/form-data), validates required dimensions 1428x2920, stores it and saves URL in sports profile. Allowed roles: PLAYER, CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
Receives avatar image (multipart/form-data), validates format and size, stores it and saves URL in user. Allowed roles: PLAYER, CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
Creates a new football tournament. Allowed roles: ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
Creates a new football team. Allowed roles: CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
Allowed roles: ADMINISTRATOR, ORGANIZER, REFEREE
Allowed roles: REFEREE
Updates the player's profile photo using base64. The photo must be in data:image/[jpeg|png];base64,... format. Allowed roles: PLAYER, CAPTAIN, ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR

400.description: Invalid photo: unsupported format, size exceeded (max 5MB) or invalid base64

patch.description: Modifies the current status of the tournament. Allowed roles: ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR

Allowed roles: ADMINISTRATOR, ORGANIZER, CAPTAIN, PLAYER

get.description: Returns personal, sports and statistics data of a user. Allowed roles: all authenticated
Retrieves the details of a tournament by its ID

delete.description: Deletes a tournament. Allowed roles: ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR

get.description: Retrieves the current roster of the team
Returns basic information about the authenticated user

delete.description: Removes a player from the team roster. Allowed roles: ORGANIZER, ADMINISTRATOR
